channel.title: Types on INFINI Pizza
channel.description: Recent content in Types on INFINI Pizza

item.title: Type Parameter
item.description: Type Parameter # analyzer: the analyzer used for indexing search_analyzer: the analyzer used for searching realtime: For non-object field, if set, this field would support realtime search index: For non-object field, if set, Pizza would build index for this field to make it searchable fields: It is often useful to index the same field in different ways for different purposes. This is the purpose of multi-fields properties: nested sub-fields
